active_requisite: Represents the expected boolean of the PlanUnit with address reason_context. If None, no check. If False expected Active bool of reason_context PlanUnit is false. If True expected contest_plan.active is True, Reason seed
addin: float that describes addition to parent range calculations, Plan seed
Anaday: First Day of 5 day week of 'Five' Epoch
assert: Used so often in Python that it cannot be given any kegolgy meaning.
atom: Smallest possible unit of a PersonUnit
attributes: General term used to describe things about another thing
awardheirs: Every PlanUnit has AwardHeirs that represent who is awarded give_fund and take_fund. AwardHeirs have every AwardUnit group_title for every PlanUnit Ancestor back to root, Plan conpute
awardlines: Every PlanUnit has AwardLines that represent who is awarded give_fund and take_fund. AwardLines have every AwardUnit group_title for every PlanUnit Descedant starting at the childless PlanUnit, Plan conpute
awardunits: Every PlanUnit has AwardUnits that represent who is awarded give_fund and take_fund, Plan seed
b_agg: 5 character abbreviation of brick_agg. stage_type_order=2 Brick Agg: The Brick Raw tables are aggregated to elimanate duplicates.
b_raw: 5 character abbreviation of brick_raw. stage_type_order=1 Brick Raw: The importable Excel Sheets entering the database
b_vld: 5 character abbreviation of brick_valid. stage_type_order=3 Brick Valid: The Brick Agg tables filtered to correct datatypes.
Baileyday: Second Day of 5 day week of 'Five' Epoch
begin: float that describes the begin of a numerical range if it exists, Plan seed
semantic_type: A datatype that is fundamentally int, str, float
init_chapter: Every keyword must have an init_chapter that describes the first chapter the keyword is allowed to appear in.
break: Used so often in Python that it cannot be given any kegolgy meaning.
BreakTerm: str first used in ch01. All str separator classes are BreakTerms. Meant to envoke the analogy of the necessity to break experience reality into things so they can be understood.
brick_agg: stage_type_order=2 Brick Agg: The Brick Raw tables are aggregated to elimanate duplicates.
brick_raw: stage_type_order=1 Brick Raw: The importable Excel Sheets entering the database
brick_valid: stage_type_order=3 Brick Valid: The Brick Agg tables filtered to correct datatypes.
bud_partner_nets: ledger of bud outcome. dict[PartnerName, FundNum]. FundNum can be negative.
bud_time: When a budget adds to the supply, bud arg, Nabuable arg
build_order: When building a world the order of dimen data implementation must be deterministic. build_order defines the order dimens are evaluated for a World.
c100_length: A C400Constant for building Epochs: 52,594,560 minutes in 100 year cycle
c400_core: 400 years without the extra leap day.
c400_core_length: A C400Constant for building Epochs: 210,378,240 minutes in 400 year cycle without last leap-day
c400_leap: 400 years with the extra leap day.
c400_leap_length: A C400Constant for building Epochs: 210,379,680 minutes in 400 year cycle
c400_number: Epoch config Integer that represents number of 400 year cycles. Defines the range of years in epoch c400_number=7 means 2800 years, Moment arg
calc_by_conpute: Describes when data is defined by conpute process. Not required seed data.
ch00: Creates helper tools for OS and python data manipulation.
ch01: Defines how to allot a pool number to a weighted ledger.
ch02: Defines debt and cred to Partners and Memberships to Groups.
ch04: Defines Term Classes: Knots, Labels, RopeTerms, FirstLabels
ch05: Defines ReasonUnits, FactUnits, and Facts decide if a Reason is Active
ch06: Defines PlanUnits with sub-plans, Awardees, Labor, Reasons, Facts, etc.
ch07: Defines a PersonUnit as a PlanUnit and PartnerUnits capable of producing an agenda.
ch08: Defines PersonAtoms: Irreducible units of change for a PersonUnit.
ch09: Defines lessons which are collections of PersonAtoms by FaceName
ch10: These tools describe how one PersonUnit listens to another.
ch11: Defines PersonBudHistory: PersonName, BudUnits (TimeNum, quota, celldepth)
ch12: Builds a simulation that describes how much credit a healer has earned.
ch13: Defines how time is handled by PersonUnits. Allows for arbitrary time structures.
ch14: Defines MomentUnits: common time tech, ledger, PartnerNames, history of PersonUnits.
ch15: Defines NabuUnit tools that interpret numeric values into inside accounting.
ch16: Defines TranslateUnit tools that translate MomentUnits into inside language.
ch17: Defines Idea Bricks: Spreadsheet data formats of any MomentUnit data.
ch18: Defines the tools that use Idea Bricks to build MomentUnits.
ch20: Defines the analytics outcomes of completed MomentUnits.
ch21: Defines WorldDirs that admin MomentUnits input data and outcomes
Chiday: Third Day of 5 day week of 'Five' Epoch
class: Used so often in Python that it cannot be given any kegolgy meaning.
close: float that describes the close of a numerical range if it exists, Plan seed
conpute: The process by which a PersonUnit creates all it's output metrics from file-stored data. Meant to invoke contemplation and computation. The PersonUnit contemplates what is important to them (their plans) and decides what they want to do. They compute their rules and create their agenda. If the PersonUnit plans are trusted with a currency quota they can be used as an Budget. Each Partner is assigned a FundNum. It may be negative.
CRUD_command: str first used in ch08 that represents database CRUD commands
Danceday: Fourth Day of 5 day week of 'Five' Epoch
day_length: A C400Constant for building Epochs: 1,440 minutes in day
day_punch: A report that summarizes the tasks of a person for a day.
dayly_duration_min: Required fields for creating Epoch dayly cases.
dayly_lower_min: Required fields for creating Epoch dayly cases.
days_lower_day: Required fields for creating Epoch every_xdays cases.
days_upper_day: Required fields for creating Epoch every_xdays cases.
DELETE: CRUD_COMMAND to delete records for a table
denom: int that describes denominator to parent range calculations, Plan seed
Eastday: Fifth Day of 5 day week of 'Five' Epoch
epoch_label: Epoch config: Name of epoch. Persons may have multiple epochs, they are differentiated by this LabelTerm, Moment arg
epoch_length: Total number of minutes in a Epoch. Calculated by number of minutes in C400_leap times Epoch's c400_number
EpochLabel: str first used in ch13. EpochLabel is required for every EpochUnit. It is a LabelTerm that must not contain the knot.
every_xdays: Required fields for creating Epoch every_xdays cases.
every_xweeks: Required fields for creating Epoch weekly cases.
FaceName: str first used in ch09. The Face is the source of all outside data.
FactNum: float first used in ch04. A numeric value that may converted to other Semantic Types by an external process driven by context.
factunits: PlanUnit holds all it's factunits in an attribute called factunits.
filename: Should always include extension ala filebasename + '.' + extension
FirstLabel: str first used in ch01. The first LabelTerm in a RopeTerm. FirstLabel cannot contain knot. Not called RootLabel to avoid confusion.
five: An Epoch. A structure for time often used in the codebase. Starts about 5000 years ago, has 16 months, 15 of which are 25 days. Week is 5 days long.
fund_cease: FundNum number at which funding ceases inside master funding range, Plan conpute
fund_give: , Partner conpute, Award conpute, Member conpute data
fund_grain: , Moment arg, Person seed, Plan conpute.
fund_onset: FundNum number at which funding onsets inside master funding range, Plan conpute
fund_take: , Partner conpute, Award conpute, Member conpute data
FundGrain: float first used in ch02. Smallest Unit of fund_num
FundNum: float first used in ch02. FundNum inherits from float class
global: Used so often in Python that it cannot be given any kegolgy meaning.
GrainNum: float first used in ch01. GrainNum represents the smallest fraction allowed
GroupMark: str first used in ch02. GroupMark(s) exist in TitleTerms to indicate its a group, no GroupMark indicates it is a PartnerName.
GroupTitle: str first used in ch02. If contains SepartorTerms(s) it represents a group otherwise its a PartnerName.
h_agg: 5 character abbreviation of heard_agg. stage_type_order=8 Populated by aggregated Heard Raw tables. Nabu number conversions take place here.
h_raw: 5 character abbreviation of heard_raw. stage_type_order=7 Populated by Sound Valid tables
h_vld: 5 character abbreviation of heard_vld. stage_type_order=9 Populated by aggregated and Nabu changed Heard Agg tables
HealerName: str first used in ch02. A NameTerm used to identify a Problem's Healer
heard_agg: stage_type_order=8 Populated by aggregated Heard Raw tables. Nabu number conversions take place here.
heard_raw: stage_type_order=7 Populated by Sound Valid tables
heard_vld: stage_type_order=9 Populated by aggregated and Nabu changed Heard Agg tables
hours_config: Epoch config List of Lists that contain two elements: hour name and the day's minute when it ends. Last item list must contain hour name and 1440 because that is the last minute of the day, partial example: [['12am', 60], ['11pm', 1440]]
import: Used so often in Python that it cannot be given any kegolgy meaning.
inx_knot: , TRANSLATE_LABEL arg, TRANSLATE_NAME arg, TRANSLATE_ROPE arg, TRANSLATE_TITLE arg
jump: To use keg requires a human to jump and try. Not easy. Not used in codebase.
knot: , Moment arg, Person seed, Plan seed, Reason seed, Case seed, Fact seed, Award seed, Labor seed, Healer seed
KnotTerm: str first used in ch04. A string to used as a delimiter in RopeTerms.
LabelTerm: str first used in ch01. A string representation of a tree node. Nodes cannot contain RopeTerm knot
LobbyID: str first used in ch22. str used to name LobbyUnit
ManaGrain: float first used in ch04. Smallest Unit of Mana.
ManaNum: float first used in ch12. ManaNum inherits from float class
match: Used so often in Python that it cannot be given any kegolgy meaning.
moment_ote1_agg: Create Database Table that holds all spark_num to bud_time pairs. Include moment_rope and person_name
moment_rope: , Moment arg, offi_time arg, paybook arg, mmtweek arg, mmtmont arg, mmthour arg, bud arg, Person seed, Plan seed, Reason seed, Case seed, Fact seed, Award seed, Labor seed, Healer seed, Partner seed, Member seed, nabu arg.
moment_static: Used to identify if the data can change or must be identify when the Moment of instantization.
MomentRope: str first used in ch09. The RopeTerm for a Moment. Must contain knots.
monthday_index: Epoch config: Changes MonthDay displayed day number. Months' day numbers are assumed to start with 0. The first day of the month is #0. The 3rd day of the month would be Day #2 of month. Most audiences prefer The first day of the month to be 1 even though this makes divisor difficult. If monthday_index=1 then the 3rd day of the month is #3, Moment arg
monthly_duration_days: Required fields for creating Epoch monthly cases.
monthly_monthday_lower: Required fields for creating Epoch monthly cases.
months_config: Epoch config: List of lists that contain two elements: month name and the year's day when it ends. Last item list must contain year's day equal 365 because it is the last day of the year. [['March', 31], ['February', 365]]
morph: bool that describes how to change parent range in calculations, Plan seed
NameTerm: str first used in ch02. All Name string classes should inherit from this class
numor: int that describes numerator to parent range calculations, Plan seed
otx_knot: , TRANSLATE_LABEL arg, TRANSLATE_NAME arg, TRANSLATE_ROPE arg, TRANSLATE_TITLE arg
parent_rope: A parent_rope of rope is created by removing the last label. For PlanUnits the parent_rope is the key for their parent PlanUnit.
parent_solo: The parent PlanUnit's PartyUnit's solo value for that party_title
partner_name: , paybook arg, Partner seed, Member seed
PartnerName: str first used in ch02. Every PartnerName object is NameTerm, must follow NameTerm format.
person_groupunit: A person dimen representing GroupUnit data. Keys: person_name, group_title. person conpute.
person_name: , paybook arg, bud arg, Person seed, Plan seed, Reason seed, Case seed, Fact seed, Award seed, Labor seed, Healer seed, Partner seed, Member seed.
person_partner_membership: A person dimen representing Membership data. Keys: person_name, partner_name, group_title. person seed.
person_partnerunit: A person dimen representing ParterUnit data. Keys: person_name, partner_name. person seed.
person_plan_awardunit: A person dimen representing AwardUnit data. Keys: person_name, plan_rope, awardee_title. person seed.
person_plan_factunit: A person dimen representing FactUnit data. Keys: person_name, plan_rope, fact_context. person seed.
person_plan_healerunit: A person dimen representing HealerUnit data. Keys: person_name, plan_rope, healer_name. person seed.
person_plan_partyunit: A person dimen representing HealerUnit data. Keys: person_name, plan_rope, party_title. person seed.
person_plan_reason_caseunit: A person dimen representing CaseUnit data. Keys: person_name, plan_rope, reason_context, reason_state. person seed.
person_plan_reasonunit: A person dimen representing ReasonUnit data. Keys: person_name, plan_rope, reason_context. person seed.
person_planunit: A person dimen representing PlanUnit data. Keys: person_name, plan_rope. person seed.
PersonName: str first used in ch07. The LabelTerm used to identify a PersonUnit. Must be a LabelTerm/NameTerm because when identifying if a PlanUnit is an active pledge the PersonName will be compared against PartnerNames. If they match the pledge will be active.
personunit: A person dimen representing PersonUnit data. Keys: person_name. person seed.
plan_rope: , Plan seed, Reason seed, Case seed, Fact seed, Award seed, Labor seed, Healer seed.
plan_task: A plan_task planUnit can change a FactUnit and change Active Plan without plan_task, Plan conpute
PoolNum: float first used in ch01. PoolNum represents any possible subset of the sum of numbers in the pool.
quota: The importance of a BudUnit. The currency given to the BudUnit to be distributed to Partners. The magnitude number will always be less then quote because its the sum of how much of the quota is distributed, bud arg
range_duration: Required fields for creating Epoch ranged cases.
range_inheritors:
# range_inheritors key: plan_rope for any Plan that inherits from a range_plan
    # range_inheritors value: plan_rope for the range_plan
    # During the conpute process range_inheritors defines when range_inheritors factheirs need to be created
range_lower_min: Required fields for creating Epoch ranged cases.
rational: If a PersonUnit's agenda is deterministic (always the same after conpute) then value is True, Person conpute
ReasonNum: float first used in ch04. A numeric value that may converted to other Semantic Types by an external process driven by context.
RespectGrain: float first used in ch02. Smallest Unit of score (RespectNum) ala 'the slightest bit of respect!'
RespectNum: float first used in ch02. RespectNum inherits from float class
RopeTerm: str first used in ch01. A string representation of a tree path. LabelTerms are seperated by knots.
s_agg: 5 character abbreviation of sound_agg. stage_type_order=5 Populated by aggregated Sound Raw dimen data (elimanate duplicates). Translate Core data is validated then used to translate non-Translate dimen data
s_raw: 5 character abbreviation of sound_raw. stage_type_order=4 The Brick Valid data is seperated by column into dimen data such as person_planunit and moment_budunit
s_vld: 5 character abbreviation of sound_vld. stage_type_order=6 The Translated Sound Agg data is aggregated to elimanate duplicates into Sound Valid
self: Used so often in Python that it cannot be given any kegolgy meaning.
solo: I can't figure out what this purpose is. Where in the codebase is it necessary for a PartyUnit to know if it the only PartyUnit in a LaborUnit, Labor seed.
sound_agg: stage_type_order=5 Populated by aggregated Sound Raw dimen data (elimanate duplicates). Translate Core data is validated then used to translate non-Translate dimen data
sound_raw: stage_type_order=4 The Brick Valid data is seperated by column into dimen data such as person_planunit and moment_budunit
sound_vld: stage_type_order=6 The Translated Sound Agg data is aggregated to elimanate duplicates into Sound Valid
SparkInt: int first used in ch11. Each Spark is a int that describes the order of data ingestion
TimeNum: int first used in ch11. An Integar that can represent a instant on the TimeNumLine
TitleTerm: str first used in ch02. If a TitleTerm contains SepartorTerms(s) it represents a group otherwise its a single member group of an PartnerName.
translate_label: 'translate_label' is a translation dimen where otx_label is translated by inx_knot, inx_label, otx_knot, unknown_str
translate_name: 'translate_name' is a translation dimen where otx_name is translated by inx_knot, inx_name, otx_knot, unknown_str
translate_rope: 'translate_rope' is a translation dimen where otx_rope is translated by inx_knot, inx_rope, otx_knot, unknown_str
translate_title: 'translate_title' is a translation dimen where otx_title is translated by inx_knot, inx_title, otx_knot, unknown_str
unknown_str: , TRANSLATE_LABEL arg, TRANSLATE_NAME arg, TRANSLATE_ROPE arg, TRANSLATE_TITLE arg
weekdays_config: Epoch config, List of Weekday names. When the Epoch begins the first Weekday in the list is the first day of the Epoch. ['Wednesday', ...'Tuesday'],
weekly_duration_min: Required fields for creating Epoch weekly cases.
weekly_lower_min: Required fields for creating Epoch weekly cases.
weeks_lower_week: Required fields for creating Epoch weekly cases.
weeks_upper_week: Required fields for creating Epoch weekly cases.
WeightNum: float first used in ch01. WeightNum represents the unnormalized value of a ledger key. The sum of all WeightNum values in a ledger is not defined.
WorldName: str first used in ch21. Name of WorldDir
year_length: A C400Constant for building Epochs: 525,600 minutes in year without leap-day
year_monthday_duration_days: Required fields for creating Epoch year_monthday cases.
year_monthday_lower: Required fields for creating Epoch year_monthday cases.
yield: Used so often in Python that it cannot be given any kegolgy meaning.
yr1_jan1_offset: Epoch config: Number of minutes the calendar is different from March 1, year 1 where Gregorian calendar is projected to year 1. Example 440640 is almost 10 months, Moment arg
yr4_core_length: A C400Constant for building Epochs: 2,102,400 minutes in 4 year cycle without leap-day
yr4_leap_length: A C400Constant for building Epochs: 2,103,840 minutes in 4 year cycle
